vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on Backup gshadow File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /etc/gshadow-, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0000 /etc/gshadow-
vulnerability.group: Verify Permissions on Files with Local Account Information and Credentials

triage_decision.reason: The remediation only changes permissions on a backup copy of the gshadow file, which is not used by the system for authentication. Adjusting file mode does not affect running services or login mechanisms, making it a low‑risk, straightforward fix.
